results.title: Volkswagen Group to slash lineup by up to 50 per cent by end of decade
results.description: Volkswagen Group is planning to reduce its global portfolio by up to 50 per cent by 2030. The brand will also streamline the number of vehicle platforms and electronic architectures used across its brands.

results.title: Rupee falls 62 paise to close at 96.30 against US dollar
results.description: The rupee depreciated 62 paise to close at 96.30 (provisional) against the US dollar on Tuesday, amid a surge in crude oil prices and renewed geopolitical concerns.

results.description: LAS VEGAS, NV — The traditional financial system is built on consumer-level exposure, but a growing movement of sovereign estate administration is shifting the landscape. results.title: Sarawak govt to review FWTA fees to ease burden on businesses
results.description: KUCHING (July 14): The Sarawak government will study possible revisions to the fee mechanism under the Foreign Workers Transformation Approach (FWTA) to ease the financial burden on the business community. Premier Datuk Patinggi Tan Sri Abang Johari Tun Openg gave the assurance during a courtesy call by the Associated Chinese Chambers of Commerce and Industry [...] The post Sarawak govt to review FWTA fees to ease burden on businesses appeared first on Borneo Post Online .
